infoPlist.NSCameraUsageDescription: Spotter uses your camera so you can photograph dogs you encounter.
infoPlist.NSLocationWhenInUseUsageDescription: Spotter uses your location to place scans on your journal map and calculate area leagues.
infoPlist.NSPhotoLibraryUsageDescription: Spotter uses your photo library when you choose an avatar.
